title: Modern C# (records, source generators, pattern matching)
summary: Master modern C# features to write expressive, fast code: records, primary constructors, file-scoped types, source generators, advanced pattern matching.
outline: Advanced pattern matching and switch expressions
prerequisites: Basic C#, ability to read object-oriented code.

title: ASP.NET Core 10 — fundamentals
summary: Build modern web APIs and applications with ASP.NET Core 10: DI, middleware, minimal APIs, EF Core, configuration, logging.

title: ASP.NET Core 10 — advanced
summary: Push ASP.NET Core to production: auth & authorization, OpenTelemetry observability, performance, robust integration tests.
prerequisites: ASP.NET Core fundamentals or equivalent experience.

title: Blazor 10 — Server, WASM and Hybrid
summary: Build SPAs and hybrid apps with Blazor: components, state, server rendering, WASM AOT, JS interop and SignalR.
outline: Blazor Server vs WASM — tech choice

title: Entity Framework Core 10
summary: Model a domain with EF Core 10: conventions, fluent API, migrations, tuned queries, concurrent SaveChanges and performance.

title: Automated testing in .NET
summary: Set up a pragmatic test strategy: xUnit, Testcontainers, snapshot testing, mutation testing, golden tests.

title: Azure for developers (AZ-204 prep)
summary: Cover the AZ-204 exam: develop Azure solutions (App Service, Functions, Cosmos DB, Service Bus, Key Vault, Identity).
outline: Key Vault, Managed Identity, App Configuration

title: Azure DevOps & CI/CD (AZ-400 prep)
summary: Build a complete DevOps pipeline: branching strategies, multi-stage CI/CD, automated testing, infrastructure as code, security and governance.
prerequisites: Team project experience, basic Git, basic cloud.

title: Azure Functions & event-driven
summary: Build event-driven architectures with Azure Functions, Service Bus, Event Grid and Durable Functions.
prerequisites: ASP.NET Core or Azure 204, async basics.

title: Azure App Service & containers
summary: Ship to production on App Service, Container Apps and ACR: slots, autoscale, networking, monitoring.
outline: Azure Container Registry and image signing

title: Azure security for developers
summary: End-to-end security for an Azure app: Key Vault, Managed Identity, networking, Defender for Cloud, secret management and RBAC.
outline: Microsoft Entra ID and Conditional Access

title: Claude Code for teams
summary: Adopt Claude Code at team scale: skills, hooks, sub-agents, plugins, MCP, governance and impact measurement.

title: GitHub Copilot — advanced
summary: Push GitHub Copilot beyond autocomplete: custom instructions, edits, agentic mode, MCP, team integration.
prerequisites: Hands-on Copilot or other IDE assistant.

title: Designing your MCP servers
summary: Build a robust Model Context Protocol server: transports, tools, resources, security, errors, deployment.
prerequisites: Hands-on backend language (TS, Python or C#), API basics.

title: On-premise AI in the enterprise
summary: Deploy generative AI on-premise: Ollama, vLLM, open-weight models, hardware sizing, integration.
outline: Open-weight model landscape (Llama, Qwen, Mistral, Gemma)
Internal use cases — code, search, summarization

title: Clean Architecture in .NET
summary: Structure a .NET app along hexagonal principles: ports & adapters, DDD-lite, domain / application / infrastructure separation.

title: Event-driven architecture & practical CQRS
summary: Implement CQRS and event-driven architecture pragmatically: commands, events, projections, outbox, idempotency.
prerequisites: ASP.NET Core, EF Core, message broker basics.

title: Modern observability — OpenTelemetry
summary: Instrument a .NET application with OpenTelemetry: traces, metrics, structured logs, Application Insights and OSS backends.

title: .NET performance & scalability
summary: Measure, profile and tune a .NET app: benchmarks, GC, allocations, async patterns, caching, load.

title: CI/CD with GitHub Actions
summary: Build robust GitHub Actions pipelines: reusable workflows, security scanning, multi-env deployment, OIDC to Azure.
prerequisites: Git basics, hands-on with any CI.
